title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1608 - Proceeding to determine parentage
text:
454.1608.  Proceeding to determine parentage. — A tribunal of this state authorized to determine parentage of a child may serve as a responding tribunal in a proceeding to determine parentage of a child brought under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728 or a law or procedure substantially similar to sections 454.1500 to 454.1728.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
